goal: Define tracking and retention boundaries for source configs, generated checkpoints, generated evidence, generated reports, and curated reviewer artifacts.

source_config.description: Small hand-authored or curated JSON inputs that define experiments, protocols, validation contracts, or claim contracts.

generated_checkpoint.description: Training and evaluation outputs such as model weights, step metadata, latest pointers, run artifacts, split reports, and config snapshots.

generated_evidence.description: Size-bounded evidence artifacts that support claims and are referenced from this manifest.

generated_report.description: Markdown or JSON reports emitted by validation, audit, or benchmark tools.

curated_reviewer_artifact.description: Selected generated outputs retained to make reviewer-facing evidence auditable.

artifact_families.tracking_policy: track hand-authored and curated config inputs
artifact_families.retention_reason: Experiment configs, protocols, claim contracts, and validation manifests are source inputs for reproducibility.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Move generated summaries out of top-level configs unless they are curated contract inputs.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Generated local training and evaluation outputs are reproducible from configs and should not enter source review by default.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Keep as the default output root for future runs.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Legacy reviewer search metadata currently referenced by audit and validation workflows.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Do not add new outputs here. Migrate selected summaries to artifacts/evidence and regenerate future outputs under ignored checkpoints/.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Legacy flow sweep metadata used for reviewer comparison and regression context.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Keep only curated summaries if claim-bearing; write future generated flow sweep outputs to checkpoints/.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Real-backend multi-seed evidence may be expensive to reproduce and can support reviewer claims when provenance is explicit.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Migrate selected summaries and coverage records to artifacts/evidence with provenance labels; keep raw reruns ignored.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Flow multi-seed evidence may remain claim-bearing when docs reference it.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Migrate selected summaries to artifacts/evidence and write future runs to checkpoints/.

artifact_families.retention_reason: PDBBind++ multi-seed metadata may support existing reviewer comparisons.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Keep selected summaries only if still referenced by claim docs; otherwise regenerate under checkpoints/.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Medium-profile multi-seed metadata may support older reviewer comparisons.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Migrate selected summaries only if claim-bearing; otherwise leave future outputs under checkpoints/.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Small multi-seed metadata may support older smoke or reviewer comparisons.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Migrate selected summaries only if claim-bearing; otherwise leave future outputs under checkpoints/.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Q2 evidence files are small and directly tied to proxy/backend correlation and postprocessing-failure claims.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Track only after provenance fields and claim references are validated.

artifact_families.retention_reason: Validation reports are useful reviewer artifacts but should not be rewritten during normal local checks unless explicitly requested.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Add generated markers and support temporary output paths.

artifact_families.tracking_policy: track curated docs; mark generated reports
artifact_families.retention_reason: Architecture, audit, claim, and validation docs make the evidence boundary reviewable.
artifact_families.migration_recommendation: Label generated reports and keep hand-maintained docs as curated documentation.

tracking_invariants: New generated checkpoint outputs must not default to configs/checkpoints/.
Generated model weights remain ignored through *.ot.
Curated evidence must be size-bounded and listed in this manifest before tracking.
Heuristic, repaired, reranked, docking, backend, and experimental evidence must retain explicit provenance labels.
